problem id: e6cbc2bd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) XOR NOT SHL(6)) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  01110100 -> 00000001
  01101101 -> 00000001
  00100110 -> 10000000
  00000001 -> 00000000
  00010001 -> 01000000
  10010000 -> 00000010
  01110011 -> 11000001
  11011010 -> 00000011

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 00000011
